text: I'll get to that joke later. Actually, no, let me just do it now since that's literally the whole bit. Why do procrastinators make great astronomers? Because they're always telling themselves they'll start tomorrow, which is technically looking toward the future. Okay that was weak. Here's the real one: I was going to write a procrastination joke but I kept putting it off, and now that I've finally done it, I'm questioning whether it was worth the wait. It wasn't.
